typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	FileName as string (),
	FoundFile as string (),
	sFileDate as string (),
	sNewFileName as string ()
}

source(output(
		Date as string,
		{Foundation Name} as string,
		Org as string,
		Space as string,
		{App Name} as string,
		{Current Droplet Buildpack Name} as string,
		Stack as string,
		{App Last Updated} as string,
		{BuildPack Deprecation Date} as string,
		{Buildpack Status} as string,
		{App ID} as string,
		{Application Name} as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		{App Lifecycle Status} as string,
		{Leadership Level 1} as string,
		{Leadership Level 2} as string,
		{Leadership Level 3} as string,
		{Application Portfolio Owner} as string,
		{Primary Technical Manager} as string,
		{Alternate Technical Manager} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false) ~> FilefromPCFDropzone
FilefromPCFDropzone derive(Import_date = currentDate()) ~> AddImportDate
AddImportDate sink(input(
		Space as string,
		App_Lifecycle_Status as string,
		Leadership_Level_3 as string,
		Leadership_Level_1 as string,
		Leadership_Level_2 as string,
		Application_Name as string,
		Org as string,
		Foundation_Name as string,
		BuildPack_Deprecation_Date as string,
		App_Name as string,
		Date as string,
		Stack as string,
		RemedyId as string,
		App_ID as string,
		Primary_Technical_Manager as string,
		App_Last_Updated as string,
		Alternate_Technical_Manager as string,
		Buildpack_Status as string,
		Application_Portfolio_Owner as string,
		Import_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		Space,
		App_Lifecycle_Status = {App Lifecycle Status},
		Leadership_Level_3 = {Leadership Level 3},
		Leadership_Level_1 = {Leadership Level 1},
		Leadership_Level_2 = {Leadership Level 2},
		Application_Name = {Application Name},
		Org,
		Foundation_Name = {Foundation Name},
		BuildPack_Deprecation_Date = {BuildPack Deprecation Date},
		App_Name = {App Name},
		Date,
		Stack,
		RemedyId,
		App_ID = {App ID},
		Primary_Technical_Manager = {Primary Technical Manager},
		App_Last_Updated = {App Last Updated},
		Alternate_Technical_Manager = {Alternate Technical Manager},
		Buildpack_Status = {Buildpack Status},
		Application_Portfolio_Owner = {Application Portfolio Owner},
		Import_date,
		Current_Droplet_Buildpack_Name = {Current Droplet Buildpack Name})) ~> SharepointTASBuildpacks
